content:
[Compressed]

## 对话历史压缩摘要

**功能测试**: 任务持久化功能

**已完成进度**:
- 任务持久化已实现（`.tasks`目录）
- 创建测试任务1-6，验证状态管理和依赖关系
- 任务3状态更新为completed，任务5依赖关系已调整

**当前问题**:
1. JSON文件中文编码乱码（UTF-8问题）
2. Maven执行失败：mainClass配置错误（cn.edu.agent.Main不存在）
3. 实际主类应为AgentApplication

**待办事项**:
- 修复pom.xml中mainClass配置（改为cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication）
- 解决JSON UTF-8编码问题
- 完成持久化重启恢复验证

content.text: 我来帮你解决这两个问题。先检查当前状态，然后修复mainClass配置和UTF-8编码问题。
看到任务列表为空，说明持久化的任务没有被加载回来。让我检查`.tasks`目录和相关代码：
让我检查`.tasks`目录和TaskManager的实现：

input.command: if exist .tasks (dir /a .tasks) else (echo .tasks directory does not exist)

content.text: 看到`.tasks`目录是空的，之前的任务文件都丢失了。TaskManager代码已经正确使用UTF-8编码。让我先修复pom.xml的mainClass配置，然后重新创建测试任务验证持久化功能：
现在添加maven-jar-plugin配置来修复mainClass问题：

input.command: type pom.xml | findstr /n "build plugins plugin" | tail -10

content.text: 让我直接编辑添加jar插件配置：
让我读取pom.xml的末尾部分确认格式：
现在我可以精确匹配并添加jar插件配置：
让我换个方式，直接读取完整pom.xml然后重写：

input.command: powershell -Command "$content = Get-Content pom.xml -Raw; $content -replace '(?s)(<build>.*?</build>)', '<build>        <plugins>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.2.5</version>            </plugin>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.3.0</version>                <configuration>                    <archive>                        <manifest>                            <mainClass>cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication</mainClass>                        </manifest>                    </archive>                </configuration>            </plugin>        </plugins>    </build>' | Set-Content pom.xml -Encoding UTF8"

content.content:
</dependency>

        <!-- s06锛欽Unit 5 娴嬭瘯渚濊禆 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
            <version>5.10.2</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.testng</groupId>
            <artifactId>testng</artifactId>
            <version>RELEASE</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>        <plugins>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.2.5</version>            </plugin>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.3.0</version>                <configuration>                    <archive>                        <manifest>                            <mainClass>cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication</mainClass>                        </manifest>                    </archive>                </configuration>            </plugin>        </plugins>    </build>
</project>

content.text: 格式被压缩了，而且中文注释出现了乱码。让我重新正确格式化pom.xml：

content.content:
﻿<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>cn.sysu</groupId>
    <artifactId>agent_demo</artifactId>
    <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId>
            <artifactId>okhttp</artifactId>
            <version>4.12.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
            <version>2.17.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.cdimascio</groupId>
            <artifactId>dotenv-java</artifactId>
            <version>3.0.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <version>1.18.32</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
            <version>2.0.13</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-simple</artifactId>
            <version>2.0.13</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- s06锛欽Unit 5 娴嬭瘯渚濊禆 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
            <version>5.10.2</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.testng</groupId>
            <artifactId>testng</artifactId>
            <version>RELEASE</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>        <plugins>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.2.5</version>            </plugin>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>                <version>3.3.0</version>                <configuration>                    <archive>                        <manifest>                            <mainClass>cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication</mainClass>                        </manifest>                    </archive>                </configuration>            </plugin>        </plugins>    </build>
</project>

content.text: 看到格式被压缩了，而且中文注释乱码了。让我重新写入正确格式的pom.xml：

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>cn.sysu</groupId>
    <artifactId>agent_demo</artifactId>
    <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId>
            <artifactId>okhttp</artifactId>
            <version>4.12.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
            <version>2.17.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.cdimascio</groupId>
            <artifactId>dotenv-java</artifactId>
            <version>3.0.0</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <version>1.18.32</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
            <version>2.0.13</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-simple</artifactId>
            <version>2.0.13</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- s06：JUnit 5 测试依赖 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId>
            <version>5.10.2</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.testng</groupId>
            <artifactId>testng</artifactId>
            <version>RELEASE</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.5</version>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.3.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <archive>
                        <manifest>
                            <mainClass>cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication</mainClass>
                        </manifest>
                    </archive>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

content.text:
好的，pom.xml已修复完成，mainClass配置为`cn.edu.agent.AgentApplication`，并且中文注释的UTF-8编码也已修复。

现在让我创建测试任务来验证持久化功能和UTF-8编码：

input.description: 包含登录、注册、密码重置功能
input.subject: 实现用户认证模块

input.description: 用户表、权限表、日志表设计
input.subject: 设计数据库架构
